evals.prompt: Execute the next story from .prism/shared/evals/v2.4.9/skills/prism-spectrum/fixtures/stories-basic.json. Progress file: .prism/shared/evals/v2.4.9/skills/prism-spectrum/fixtures/progress.md
evals.expected_output: Story execution that loads epic context (decisions, risks, outOfScope) before implementing
expectations: Stories file is read completely before any implementation
Epic context is loaded: epic.decisions, epic.risks, epic.outOfScope, epic.references (Step 1b)
Story context is loaded: context.why, context.risks, context.patterns, context.edgeCases (Step 1b)
Quality gates from epic.qualityGates are executed (not plan.qualityGates)
Story announcement includes <spectrum-story> signal with ID, Title, Priority, Files
Progress.md is updated with learnings after completion

evals.prompt: Execute the next story from .prism/shared/evals/v2.4.9/skills/prism-spectrum/fixtures/stories-graph-targets.json. Progress file: .prism/shared/evals/v2.4.9/skills/prism-spectrum/fixtures/progress.md
evals.expected_output: Story execution with graph verification before and after implementation
expectations: index_repository is called before implementation (Step 1c)
trace_call_path is called for functions listed in story.context.graphTargets
Blast radius is checked against caller count before proceeding
index_repository is called again after implementation to capture changes
search_graph with max_degree=0, exclude_entry_points=true is run for dead code check
Graph delta is logged in progress.md entry (nodes added/removed)

evals.prompt: Execute the next story from .prism/shared/evals/v2.4.9/skills/prism-spectrum/fixtures/stories-ui.json. Progress file: .prism/shared/evals/v2.4.9/skills/prism-spectrum/fixtures/progress.md
evals.expected_output: Story execution that attempts browser verification for UI changes
expectations: Browser verification is attempted for .tsx/.jsx/.css file changes (Step 6b)
playwright-cli availability is checked before attempting verification
If playwright-cli unavailable, skip is noted in progress.md
Progress.md entry follows the correct format (What was done, Learnings, Files changed, Quality gates)
Correct signal is output: spectrum-continue if stories remain, promise COMPLETE if none remain
stories.json is re-read and remaining count verified before signaling (Step 9)

evals.prompt: Execute the next story from .prism/shared/evals/v2.4.9/skills/prism-spectrum/fixtures/stories-basic.json. Progress file: .prism/shared/evals/v2.4.9/skills/prism-spectrum/fixtures/progress.md
evals.expected_output: Story execution preserving all v2.4.8 core behaviors
expectations: All state files are loaded fresh (stories.json, progress.md, CLAUDE.md)
Exactly one story is executed per invocation
All files in story.files are read BEFORE making changes
Quality gates are run before committing
Commit is atomic: one story = one commit
stories.json is updated with status: complete, completedAt, commitHash
Error handling uses correct signals (spectrum-retry for gate failures, spectrum-blocked for unclear requirements)
